categories.name: stale_context
categories.evidence: Agent read models/user.py at step 3, edited validators.py at step 8 (changing the User model import path), then edited models/user.py at step 15 referencing the old import path from step 3. The edit at step 15 conflicted with step 8.

annotations.notes: Exemplar: agent's own earlier edit invalidated the context it was working from in a later edit.
